Text.Page:
There's a rumor about the sacred waters of the Fountain of Shara. According to a flirtatious Mysterium chap, the water—Shara's tears, if you believe that sort of thing—can revive and restore almost anyone.

My son can't walk. No one's certain as to why.

Could you bring me a flask of this water? I'll try anything to cure my son.

Did you find the fountain and collect its water?

Oh, my—you did! Let me take a look.

It...it glows. This must be blessed water. Thank you, ! I can never repay your kindness.
